title: Childbirth Education - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Childbirth Education 28 Matching Service Providers 211INFO 211INFO MATERNAL AND CHILD HEALTH PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF 211info's Maternal and Child Health Program provides specialized information, referral, and follow-up services to individuals and family members of all genders covering needs and questions related to pregnancy, maternal and child health, sexual and reproductive health, and women's health across the life span, including resources for women with breast cancer. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email 211 Visit Website More Details ADVENTIST HEALTH ADVENTIST HEALTH PORTLAND BIRTH, LABOR, DELIVERY CLASSES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Classes provide information about all options about birth, labor, delivery, breastfeeding, and caring for a newborn. 10123 SE Market Street Portland, OR 97216 Eligibility: Pregnant parents Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 256-4000 Get Directions Visit Website More Details AFRICAN FAMILY HOLISTIC HEALTH ORGANIZATION WATOTO WETU MATERNAL PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides childbirth and prenatal classes, doula referrals, and baby showers with gifts to participants. Supports parents with emotional, social and economic support. Offers families post-birth home visits with baby items such as diapers and wipes. Hosts Every Child a Reader classes featuring group reading activities for children. Program is limited to 15 participants. 1445 SE 122nd Avenue Portland, OR 97233 Eligibility: -Low income Black Diaspora, African Immigrant and Refugee pregnant individuals and new mothers aged 23 or younger -Diapers and wipes: Ages 0-18 months who are part of the Black Diaspora community Hours: Walk in: Tuesday/Friday 9am-5pm Phone: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Every Child a Reader Class: Thursday 10:30am-noon Email (503) 206-7672 Get Directions Visit Website More Details DESCHUTES COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH OREGON MOTHERSCARE AND PERINATAL CARE COORDINATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Oregon MothersCare provides prenatal assessments to help women begin the path to prenatal care. Services include pregnancy testing, OHP application assistance, streamlined intake/referral for prenatal care, and dental care referrals. Specialized information and referral also available for WIC, home visitation programs, and other prenatal support services. The Perinatal Care Coordination program is able to provide individual case management during the prenatal and postpartum periods. Services include childbirth education, nurse home visiting, maternal mental health resources and counseling, and information and referral for community resources and infant care supplies. 2577 NE Courtney Drive Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Individuals needing prenatal or postpartum resources Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 322-7400 Get Directions Visit Website More Details DESCHUTES COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH DOWNTOWN HEALTH CENTER REDMOND OREGON MOTHERSCARE AND PERINATAL CARE COORDINATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Oregon MothersCare provides prenatal assessments to help women begin the path to prenatal care. Services include pregnancy testing, OHP application assistance, streamlined intake/referral for prenatal care, and dental care referrals. Specialized information and referral also available for WIC, home visitation programs, and other prenatal support services. The Perinatal Care Coordination program is able to provide individual case management during the prenatal and postpartum periods. Services include childbirth education, nurse home visiting, maternal mental health resources and counseling, and information and referral for community resources and infant care supplies. 236 NW Kingwood Avenue Redmond, OR 97756 Eligibility: Individuals needing prenatal or postpartum resources Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 322-7448 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FAMILIES FIRST PARENT RESOURCE CENTER BABY STEPS BIRTH AND BEYOND PRENATAL EDUCATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Prenatal classes help parents feel calm and confident with the birthing process, while reducing the duration of labor. Topics include prenatal, and postpartum nutrition, relief for common discomforts during pregnancy, creating a birth plan, stages of labor, calming a crying baby, and car seat installation. 401 S Canyon Boulevard John Day, OR 97845 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies by service. All home visits are scheduled with families in advance per their need. Email (541) 575-1006 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HILLSBORO MEDICAL CENTER HEALTH EDUCATION CENTER COMMUNITY EDUCATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Hillsboro Medical Center offers a variety of community education classes. Classes include childbirth education, newborn care, infant massage, breastfeeding support, and CPR & first aid classes. 334 SE 8th Avenue Hillsboro, OR 97123 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm. Class and support group times vary and may include the evening and weekends. (503) 681-1700 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HILLSBORO MEDICAL CENTER COMMUNITY EDUCATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Hillsboro Medical Center offers a variety of community education classes. Classes include childbirth education, newborn care, infant massage, breastfeeding support, and CPR & first aid classes. 335 SE 8th Avenue Hillsboro, OR 97123 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm. Class and support group times vary and may include the evening and weekends. Email (503) 681-1700 Get Directions Visit Website More Details KAISER PERMANENTE HEALTH CARE KAISER PERMANENTE NORTHEAST REGION MEDICAL GROUP HEALTH ENGAGEMENT AND WELLNESS SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides health classes available in person and online. Class topics include pregnancy, parenting, substance use disorders and a variety of other health-related classes. 500 NE Multnomah Boulevard Suite 100 Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Varies by class Hours: Varies by class (503) 286-6816 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MOTHER & CHILD EDUCATION CENTER PARENTING GROUPS AND CLASSES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides childbirth education, newborn care classes, safe sleep workshop, breastfeeding workshop/support, and other classes which vary by season. 1515 NE 41st Avenue Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Most classes are for parents and other caregivers of children under the age of 5 Hours: Class times vary Email (503) 249-5801 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NEIGHBORHOOD HEALTH CENTER NHC TANASBOURNE MEDICAL & DENTAL CLINIC PRENATAL CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Prenatal care offered through partnership with OHSU Hillsboro Medical Clinic. Patients who receive prenatal care at NHC will work with providers to make delivery arrangements at Hillsboro Medical Center. Prenatal care services include routine scheduled exams, lactation education and support, along with birth planning, postpartum, and well baby care. 10690 NE Cornell Road Suite 220 Hillsboro, OR 97124 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm (503) 848-5861 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OHSU CENTER FOR WOMEN'S HEALTH CENTER FOR WOMEN’S HEALTH CHILDBIRTH AND PARENTING PREPARATION CLASSES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a variety of prenatal, childbirth, newborn care, breastfeeding education, and infant safety classes. Also offers several support groups, such as a new moms group. 808 SW Campus Drive 7th Floor Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Varies Hours: No standard hours Email (503) 418-4500 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PREGNANCY AND PARENTING CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A faith-based agency that provides pregnancy tests and pregnancy options information. Services include prenatal, parenting, and life skills education and support, maternity clothing, baby clothing, toddler clothing, and diapers. Offers a weekly parent/child playgroup, and monthly parent lunch group. Provides miscarriage support, support after abortion, and connections to local resources. Does not provide referrals to abortion services. 475 Laurel Street Florence, OR 97439 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday/Thursday 10am-4pm, 4pm-7pm by appointment only Email (541) 902-2273 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PROVIDENCE HEALTH AND SERVICES OREGON AND SOUTHWEST WASHINGTON PROVIDENCE MEDFORD MEDICAL CENTER BIRTH EDUCATION CLASSES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides virtual and in-person classes to help in childbirth preparation. Topics include pregnancy, labor, comfort techniques, medical procedures, cesarean birth, newborns, and postpartum. 1111 Crater Lake Avenue Medford, OR 97504 Eligibility: Pregnant individuals in the 2nd and 3rd trimester and their support partners Hours: Varies by class (503) 216-5641 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PROVIDENCE HEALTH AND SERVICES OREGON AND SOUTHWEST WASHINGTON PROVIDENCE NEWBERG MEDICAL CENTER BIRTH EDUCATION CLASSES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides virtual and in-person classes to help in childbirth preparation. Topics include pregnancy, labor, comfort techniques, medical procedures, cesarean birth, newborns, and postpartum. 1500 Division Street Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Pregnant individuals in the 2nd and 3rd trimester and their support partners Hours: Varies by class (503) 216-5641 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ROGUE BIRTH CENTER NATURAL CHILDBIRTH AND BREASTFEEDING CLASS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a 4-hour Natural Childbirth and Breastfeeding Intensive Class. Classes educate families on pregnancy, labor, natural birth, breastfeeding, natural parenting and support through postpartum period. 1453 Redwood Circle Grants Pass, OR 97527 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Call or visit website for class schedule information Email (541) 916-8333 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SANTIAM HOSPITAL AND CLINICS SANTIAM WOMEN'S CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a range of women’s health care, including annual exams, female sterilization and family planning including prenatal care and delivery. 1373 N 10th Avenue Stayton, OR 97383 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm (503) 769-9522 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SKY LAKES MEDICAL CENTER FAMILY BIRTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers childbirth classes, lactation consultations, and Baby Beginnings, a class for first-time parents. The program also provides prenatal, delivery, and postnatal care, as well as well-baby checkups and obstetric and gynecological services. 2865 Daggett Avenue Klamath Falls, OR 97601 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm (541) 882-6311 Get Directions Visit Website More Details TOWER OF HEALTH LLC NATUROPATHIC MIDWIFERY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides naturopathic midwifery care, including preconception, pregnancy, prenatal, postpartum, and parent and infant aftercare services. Doula services offered along with birth classes. 10175 SW Barbur Boulevard Suite 300 BB Portland, OR 97219 Eligibility: Must be pregnant or post partum Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 464-6911 Get Directions Visit Website More Details WOMEN'S HEALTH CENTER OF SOUTHERN OREGON WOMEN'S HEALTH CENTER OF SOUTHERN OREGON GRANTS PASS WOMEN'S HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a full range of Obstetric and Gynecological care. Services include contraceptives, menopause counseling and therapy, STD counseling and treatment, bladder surgery, premenstrual therapy, family planning, mother and infant care. 1075 SW Grandview Avenue Suite 200 Grants Pass, OR 97527 Eligibility: Individuals who identify as female age 10 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-5pm (541) 479-8363 Get Directions Visit Website More Details WOMEN'S HEALTH CENTER OF SOUTHERN OREGON WOMEN'S HEALTH CENTER OF SOUTHERN OREGON GRANTS PASS CHILDBIRTH CLASSES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers childbirth education classes. Options include a one-day class. 1075 SW Grandview Avenue Suite 200 Grants Pass, OR 97527 Eligibility: Expectant parents 30-32 weeks pregnant Hours: Saturdays; hours vary (541) 479-8386 Get Directions Visit Website More Details YAKIMA VALLEY FARM WORKERS CLINIC LANCASTER FAMILY HEALTH CENTER AT BEVERLY COMMUNITY HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides Maternity Support Services and Infant Case Management. The Care Team will assist the family with resources, education regarding pregnancy, breastfeeding, labor & delivery, parenting skills, or setting goals. Services are offered by phone, in the clinics, or in the client’s home. 3896 Beverly Avenue NE Suite 40 Salem, OR 97305 Eligibility: Medicaid required Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (509) 457-6540 3675 Get Directions Visit Website More Details YAKIMA VALLEY FARM WORKERS CLINIC MIRASOL FAMILY HEALTH CENTER COMMUNITY HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides Maternity Support Services and Infant Case Management.
